title: phelypaea purpurea
intro: Phelypaea purpurea, also known as Purple Phelpaea, is a flowering plant species belonging to the evening primrose family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds which contain a unique oil rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phelypaea purpurea include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS), menopausal symptoms, and skin conditions such as eczema. Phelypaea purpurea seeds can be used in herbal preparations like capsules, oil supplements, or infused in teas and tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
